sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105509" key="tropaiofori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τροπαιοφορ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing of a trophy,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg023:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Comp.Pel.Marc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
